package rulecoverage

func PositiveFeatureFlagLookupWithoutConfigAbstraction() string {
    ruleID := "feature_flag_lookup_without_config_abstraction"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Handlers or services that query feature flags directly without a focused flag interface."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
